name: io.github.AgiMaulana/CodemagicMcp
description: Codemagic CI/CD MCP Server — manage builds, apps, artifacts, and caches from your AI

environmentVariables.name: CODEMAGIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Codemagic API key (found in User Settings → Integrations → Codemagic API)

environmentVariables.name: CODEMAGIC_DEFAULT_APP_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default Codemagic app ID to use when not specified in tool calls
